name: com.trueppm/mcp-server
title: TruePPM (read-only)
description: Read-only Model Context Protocol server for self-hosted TruePPM. Query the live schedule, board, risks, Monte Carlo forecast, sprints, and My Work from any MCP client. Every answer is computed server-side by TruePPM's own CPM/Monte Carlo engine under your existing role-based permissions — never guessed by a model, never leaving your instance.

environmentVariables.name: TRUEPPM_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your self-hosted TruePPM instance, e.g. https://ppm.example.com (the /api/v1 suffix is appended automatically if omitted).

environmentVariables.name: TRUEPPM_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: A personal access token (tppm_<64-hex>) with the mcp:read scope and a required expiry, minted from Personal Settings -> API tokens. Project- or program-scoped tokens are rejected by the read surface.
